stemHtml: A crew is flying an aircraft to the destination Aerodrome A, with Aerodrome B being their alternate. For a turbojet-engine airplane, the final reserve fuel should be fuel for…

options.a: 30 min holding at 1500 ft above Aerodrome B.
options.b: 15 min holding at 2000 ft above Aerodrome A.
options.c: 45 min holding at 2000 ft above Aerodrome B.
options.d: 30 min holding at 1000 ft above Aerodrome A.
